title: Engineer (Project)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Oversee end-to-end implementation and management of assigned projects to ensure timely and quality delivery.
  • Develop and prepare detailed work schedules upon award of the project.
  • Coordinate and supervise vendors and sub-contractors to ensure compliance with technical specifications and quality standards.
  • Review and ensure accuracy, orderliness and completeness of documentation from vendors and sub-contractors, including technical and material submissions.
  • Monitor overall project progress and provide regular updates and status reports to management and clients.
  • Conduct routine site inspections and manage work schedules to ensure smooth operations and timely execution.
  • Identify potential issues or delays and implement appropriate solutions to mitigate risks.
  • Prepare test scripts, schedules, and reports for Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) and Site Acceptance Tests (SAT), and coordinate client invitations for witness testing.
  • Liaise with consultants and clients for Integrated System Testing (IST), and coordinate all relevant stakeholders, including vendors, sub-contractors, and internal departments.
  • Collaborate with the CAD team to identify and rectify discrepancies in construction drawings and ensure accuracy in as-built drawings.
  • Work with the Project Administration team to prepare Operation & Maintenance Manuals (OMM) and project handover documentation.


Requirements

  • Degree/Diploma with at least 1 year of experience in project / engineering / construction management, preferably in data centre or critical environment. (ITE holder with relevant years of experience or fresh degree/diploma holder can be considered)
  • Strong understanding of project management and high level of accuracy and attention to detail to ensure smooth technical workflows.
  • Proficiency in utilizing project management tools and methodologies.
  • Certification in workplace safety (eg. WSQ, WSH) preferred.
  • Positive proactive attitude and ethical behaviour.
  • Team player with ability to work independently and resolve challenges in a fast-paced environment.
  • Excellent interpersonal, communication and collaborative skills.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Microsoft Word, Excel and PowerPoint).

postedCompany.description: Acme Associates Pte Ltd (ACME) offers Critical Infrastructure Lifecycle Solutions (CILS) for critical infrastructure like Data Centers, providing one-stop solution that includes Audit & Feasibility studies, Design & Build, Project Management and after sale support.
postedCompany.name: ACME ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD.
